purpose: Frozen public claim thresholds for matched external SOTA comparison.

on_target.primary_benchmark_regime: canonical 9-dataset Cas9 on-target benchmark with 5-fold CV; SCC primary and PCC secondary
on_target.claim_rule: Beat the CRISPR_HNN average under the same 9-dataset regime and meet or beat the CRISPR-FMC strong per-dataset and transfer thresholds.

classification_transfer_lodo.benchmark_frame: multi-assay compiled benchmark with matched Cas-OFFinder negative generation

unified_classifier_secondary.benchmark_frame: sgRNA-based unified classifier across CHANGE-seq, GUIDE-seq, TTISS, and independent tests

regression_uncertainty.benchmark_frame: CHANGE-seq probabilistic off-target regression with uncertainty

thresholds.calibration_requirement: match or improve crispAI qualitative Kuleshov-style interval calibration on held-out CHANGE-seq

calibration.on_target_external_target: No universally accepted claim-valid external numeric target; use uncertainty-aware CRISPRon-derived ensemble as secondary context only.
calibration.off_target_external_target: crispAI interval calibration on held-out CHANGE-seq is the primary external reference class.

minimum_claim_valid_benchmark.utility_definition: explicit joint utility combining on-target score and off-target risk
